---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

# 🚀 Feature Request

## Summary
Provide a short and clear description of the feature you would like to see.

---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe the issue.

Example:
> It is difficult to...

---

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you would like this feature to work.

Include as much detail as possible.

---

## Expected Benefits
How would this feature improve the project?

- Performance
- Security
- Usability
- Reliability
- Documentation
- Other

---

## Possible Implementation
If you have ideas on how this feature could be implemented, describe them here.

(Optional)

---

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

---

## Additional Context
Add screenshots, diagrams, mockups, links, or any other information that may help explain your request.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] This feature does not already exist.
- [ ] I have provided enough detail to explain the request.
